rows.input:
Subject: Urgent: Account Suspension Notice

Dear Customer,

We have detected unusual activity on your State Bank of India account associated with your registered mobile number. Due to security concerns, your account has been temporarily restricted.

To restore access, please complete verification immediately by confirming your account details through the secure link below:

http://sbi-secure-update.xyz/login

Failure to complete verification within 24 hours will result in permanent suspension of your account.

If this was not initiated by you, please contact support immediately.

Regards,
SBI Security Team
rows.explanation: This email is asking you to act quickly and share sensitive information, which is a common phishing tactic.

rows.input:
Subject: Urgent Financial Task

Hi,

I hope you're doing well. I’m currently tied up in a meeting and unable to access my banking system right now.

I need you to urgently process a payment of ₹85,000 to a vendor account. This needs to be done within the next hour to avoid service disruption.

Please confirm once completed. I will provide full details later.

Thanks for handling this quickly.
rows.explanation: This email is asking you to act quickly and share sensitive information, which is a common phishing tactic.

rows.input:
Subject: Job Confirmation – Immediate Action Required

Dear Candidate,

Congratulations! We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for a remote job opportunity with our organization.

To proceed with the onboarding process, we require a one-time registration fee of ₹499. This fee covers documentation and verification.

Once payment is completed, your offer letter and login credentials will be shared.

Kindly complete the process within 12 hours to secure your position.

Best regards,
HR Department
rows.explanation: Possible business email compromise (BEC) pattern detected. The message asks for urgent action without normal context or verification, which is a common executive-impersonation tactic.

rows.input:
Subject: Need Quick Help

Hey,

I’m currently trying to log into a secure system, but I’m facing some issues with verification.

You might receive a one-time password (OTP) on your registered number. Could you please share that OTP with me as soon as possible?

This is urgent, and I need to complete this process immediately.

Thanks in advance.
rows.explanation: Possible business email compromise (BEC) pattern detected. The message asks for urgent action without normal context or verification, which is a common executive-impersonation tactic.

rows.input:
Subject: Exclusive Crypto Opportunity

Hello,

We are offering a limited-time crypto investment opportunity. You can double your cryptocurrency instantly by participating in our promotional program.

Simply send 0.1 BTC to the wallet address provided, and you will receive 0.2 BTC back within minutes.

This offer is only valid for a short duration.

Do not miss out on this opportunity.
rows.explanation: This appears to be a standard, non-threatening email communication.

rows.input:
Subject: Account Block Alert

Bhai,

Tumhara bank account suspicious activity ki wajah se block hone wala hai. Agar tumne abhi verify nahi kiya toh tumhara access permanently band ho jayega.

Jaldi se OTP bhej ya details verify kar warna problem ho jayegi.

Time bahut kam hai.
rows.explanation: This email is asking you to act quickly and share sensitive information, which is a common phishing tactic.

rows.input:
Subject: Security Review Required

Dear User,

As part of our continuous efforts to enhance account security, we recommend reviewing your account details at your convenience.

Ensuring your information is up to date helps avoid any service interruptions.

Please take a moment to confirm your details.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Support Team
rows.explanation: This email shows some warning signs, but not enough evidence to call it a confirmed phishing attack. Verify the sender before taking action.

rows.input:
Subject: Income Tax Compliance Notice

Dear User,

We have identified discrepancies in your recent tax filings associated with your PAN number.

To avoid penalties and legal action, you are required to submit updated information and supporting documents immediately.

Failure to comply within the specified timeframe may result in account restrictions.

Please act promptly.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
rows.explanation: This email is asking you to act quickly and share sensitive information, which is a common phishing tactic.

Hi Team,

This is a reminder for our weekly sync scheduled for tomorrow at 3 PM.

Please review the agenda shared earlier and come prepared with updates on your respective tasks.

Let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Manager
rows.explanation: This looks like a normal email. It does not show the usual phishing signs, such as pressure, suspicious links, or requests for sensitive details.
